title: ERROR: Found error in internal cell
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

[test.zip](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/files/2730336/test.zip)

extract `test.v` from `test.zip`

    yosys -p "synth_ice40 -blif test.blif" test.v

## Expected behavior

No error.

This design works as expected with Vivado

## Actual behavior

    ERROR: Found error in internal cell \test_deflate_bench.$auto$share.cc:714:make_supercell$43901 
    ($mux) at kernel/rtlil.cc:717:
      cell $mux $auto$share.cc:714:make_supercell$43901
        parameter \WIDTH 9
        connect \Y $auto$rtlil.cc:1754:Mux$43902
        connect \S $auto$share.cc:982:make_cell_activation_logic$43898
        connect \B \deflate0_b1
        connect \A $add$test.v:1514$1817_Y [8:0]
      end
